name: It's About Time
description: When Mark Grayson finally inherits powers from his superhero father, it's a dream come true. But there's more to being a hero than just choosing a name and costume.

name: Here Goes Nothing
description: With his father out of action, Mark struggles to defend the city against an interdimensional invasion, joining forces with a team of teenage superheroes.

name: Who You Calling Ugly?
description: Mark has to cut a study date short to help save Mount Rushmore from a crazed scientist. Robot deals with Action - Comic as he assembles a new team of world-saving superheroes.

name: Neil Armstrong, Eat Your Heart Out
description: It's two firsts for Mark: a first date and a first trip to another planet. At the same time, Nolan and Debbie revisit their own first vacation together.

name: That Actually Hurt
description: Feeling confident in his new abilities, Mark risks a team-up with a local villain to take down a crime lord, while simultaneously juggling school and a new relationship.

name: You Look Kinda Dead
description: Mark joins William and Amber on a campus visit to Upstate University, hoping to discover a new future for himself. Debbie makes her own disturbing discovery.

name: We Need To Talk
description: Feeling lost and confused, Mark looks for advice from Eve. At the same time, everyone's looking for him.

name: Where I Really Come From
description: Mark must prove he's become the hero he's always wanted to be by stopping an unstoppable force.

name: A Lesson For Your Next Life
description: In the aftermath of his father's betrayal, Mark struggles with his responsibilities as Invincible and encounters an unexpected enemy.

name: In About Six Hours, I Lose My Virginity to a Fish
description: It's summer break for Mark and his friends, but supervillains don't take a vacation. Mark is forced to face the consequences of his Viltrumite father's double life.

name: This Missive, This Machination!
description: Mark starts his college career, Debbie struggles with personal trauma, and Allen the Alien returns home to find a new threat facing the Coalition of Planets.

name: It's Been a While
description: Mark answers the call to save an alien species, but the mission has unexpected personal consequences.

name: This Must Come as a Shock
description: The Grayson household is upended when Mark returns to Earth with surprising new responsibilities. The Guardians of the Globe face dangers both at home and away.

name: It's Not That Simple
description: After two challenging missions, The Guardians of the Globe struggle to work as a team. Meanwhile, Mark tries to balance his hero duties, personal relationships, and his future as a college student.

name: I'm Not Going Anywhere
description: As Mark attempts to salvage his personal life, a new villain arrives, presenting Invincible with his greatest challenge yet. Donald grapples with his past.

name: I Thought You Were Stronger
description: An old enemy threatens everything Mark holds dear.

name: You're Not Laughing Now
description: Mark Grayson is back and stronger than ever, with new enemies out for blood and old villains out for revenge.

name: A Deal with the Devil
description: Mark takes a stand, unaware of the ramifications for his family, the GDA, and even the Guardians. Cecil remembers his past and Eve makes an important decision.

name: You Want a Real Costume, Right?
description: Mark struggles to teach Oliver what it means to be a superhero. Debbie explores a new relationship and a changed family dynamic.

name: You Were My Hero
description: Two strangers ask Mark for help with a mysterious villain. Elsewhere in the galaxy, Nolan grapples with his identity and Allen finds a surprising new ally.

name: This Was Supposed To Be Easy
description: Mark and Eve start a business and encounter a familiar face. Debbie worries that Oliver's growing up too quickly.

name: All I Can Say Is I'm Sorry
description: A powerful new figure challenges Mark's idea of what's right and what's wrong. Rae approaches Rex with a big life decision.

name: What Have I Done?
description: Earth's greatest heroes join forces to fight an unimaginable threat.

name: I Thought You'd Never Shut Up
description: With the world still reeling, a dangerous stranger arrives testing Mark to his limits and beyond.

name: Making the World a Better Place
description: Mark battles enemies new and old in his fight to keep Earth safe.

name: I'll Give You the Grand Tour
description: Loyalties are challenged when an old enemy is revealed.

name: I Gotta Get Some Air
description: Consequences weigh on Mark. Oliver takes on a new job.

name: Hurm
description: Hurm.

name: Give Us a Moment
description: Mark embarks on a new and dangerous mission, throwing Debbie into a tailspin and plunging Eve into uncertainty.

name: You Look Horrible
description: Family bonds are put to the test. Under pressure, Allen makes a new friend.

name: Don't Do Anything Rash
description: Nothing goes according to plan during a massive confrontation.

name: Don't Leave Me Hanging Here
description: Mark confronts his darkest fears as his life changes forever.
